raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I purchased a laptop from XXXX using my American Express credit card. However, the laptop was never delivered. I attempted to contact XXXX to resolve the issue, but I was unexpectedly locked out of my XXXX account, which prevented me from accessing my order information or communicating with their customer service. 

I then filed a XXXX XXXX claim with American Express. I also filed a police report with the XXXX XXXX XXXX  and submitted both the report and the purchase receipt to Amex. 

Despite submitting all required documents, I have not received any resolution or meaningful update from American Express. I have followed up, but there has been no clear response or progress. 

I am able to provide the order confirmation, emails received from XXXX, and a copy of the official police report to support this claim. I respectfully request that the CFPB assist in ensuring that this matter is handled fairly and without further delay.r.
